title: React Textarea Character Counter

statement.markdown:
## React Textarea Character Counter

Create a TextArea component displaying remaining character counts.

### Requirements:
1. **Real-time Counter**: Display `character count / maxLength` (e.g. `120 / 250`) updated instantly on keypress.
2. **Borders on Limit**: Apply warning red colors on input border and count text when characters reach or exceed the limit.
3. **Auto-resize**: Automatically resize the height of the textarea based on the amount of content typed to avoid scrolling bars.

constraints: Must style elements with Tailwind CSS

gradingCriteria.description: Verify that the interactive props, callbacks, and element structures work cleanly.
Verify state structure designs and clean Tailwind CSS layouts.
